title: rubus turneri
intro: Rubus turneri, also known as Turner's Raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus turneri include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus turneri can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to support digestive health and immune function.
